Begin Your Journey

Our Sanctuary

Where the Prana
meets the Sky

Perched high above the mist-cloaked valleys of Pothundy Dam, Sadh Guru Mani Mandiram is more than a training center — it is a living temple of breath, consciousness, and inner light. Rooted in the ancient science of Prana Vidya, our ashram welcomes seekers from all walks of life to rediscover the vital life-force that animates all existence.

Surrounded by the Western Ghats and the natural serenity of Kerala's highlands, our centre offers an unparalleled environment for deep practice, healing, and transformation.

5.0 · Spiritist Centre · Google Reviews
Open-Air Meditation Pavilion
Pothundy Valley · Western Ghats
Seasonal Harvest · Pothundy Fields

The Ancient Science

What is Prana Vidya?

Prana Vidya — the sacred knowledge of life-force — is one of the most profound healing and spiritual disciplines from the Vedic tradition. Through mastery of breath, awareness, and energy, practitioners unlock capacities of mind, body, and soul that lie dormant in ordinary life.

Prana & Breath

Learn to consciously direct the subtle life-force (prana) through pranayama, visualization, and inner awareness — the foundation of all higher practices.

Energy Healing

Channel prana for self-healing and to support others. Develop sensitivity to the aura, chakras, and energy body through guided experiential training.

Meditation & Samadhi

Structured dhyana practices leading progressively inward — from concentration to witnessing awareness — guided by our lineage's time-tested methods.

Offerings

Training Programs

01

Foundation in Prana Vidya

A complete introduction to pranic breathing, energy awareness, and foundational meditation. Open to all — no prior experience required.

Weekend Intensive
02

Pranic Healing Certification

Systematic training in scanning, cleansing, and energizing the human energy field for health and wellbeing. Internationally recognised methods.

5-Day Course
03

Advanced Pranayama & Yoga

Classical hatha and raja yoga integrated with advanced breath-work and kriya practices for dedicated spiritual aspirants.

Residential
04

Silent Retreat

Immerse in deep inner silence amid the Western Ghats. Daily guided meditation, satsang, and sacred nature walks along the Pothundy reservoir.

7 Days
05

Teacher Training Program

For those called to share these teachings. Comprehensive study of Vedic philosophy, teaching methodology, and advanced practice.

By Application

Getting Here

Approximately 5 minutes from Pothundy Dam viewpoint. Nearest town: Nemmara. Palakkad Railway Station ~30 km. Coimbatore Airport ~60 km.

The Teacher

Vijayan Vijayakumaran Vasu

Yoga Practitioner · Spiritual Teacher · Palakkad, Kerala

"Rooted in ancient wisdom, he bridges the timeless science of yoga with the lived experience of modern seekers."

Vijayan (Vijayakumaran Vasu) is a dedicated yoga practitioner and spiritual teacher with over 30 years of devoted practice. He is the founder of Vaanaprastham — the School of Yoga and Oriental Studies — and serves as a consulting Astrologer, Palmist, and Tantric Healer.

His spiritual formation was shaped by a lineage of revered masters — Mani Swamy, Krishna Guruji, and Guru Nithya Chaitanya Yathi — under whose guidance he absorbed the depths of Gyanyoga, Bhakti Marga, Gayathri Hawanam, Homatherapy, and Tantric Healing. He regularly undertakes Sadhana journeys to the Himalayas to deepen his practice and inner realisation.

His teachings include a Tension Free Workshop integrating Asanas, Pranayama and Mantra; a Five-Tier Meditation system addressing the physical, pranic, intellectual, mental, and spiritual energy levels; and Tantric remedies for horoscopic and psychosomatic problems through Hora Shastra and Vasthu Shastra.

Vijayan serves as a consultant at Kairali Resort, Palakkad and Om Vedic Heritage Centre, Singapore, where he has helped hundreds through Astrology and Tantric Healing. His wife, Chitra Vijayan, serves as a Yoga Teacher at the institution.

30 YRS PRACTICE HIMALAYAN SADHANA GYANYOGA BHAKTI MARGA TANTRIC HEALING VASTHU SHASTRA
